Text.Page:
I need a professional exterminator.

The Kazuur Syndicate is infesting the {@Rgn:9024001}. They're like cockroaches. You have to root them out and stomp on them really hard. And then you have to cut off their heads, just to make sure!

Care to do some stomping?

Go into the {@Rgn:9024001} and kill {@LinkCreature:424#1000$$Logran}, {@LinkCreature:424#1006$$Agarta}, {@LinkCreature:424#1016#Kornus}, and that cursed reaper, {@LinkCreature:424#2000$$Kaprima}. Without their heads, the rest of the cockroaches will scurry off into the dark.

Report to {@LinkCreature:212#1006} after you're done exterminating.
Great job. That should keep the Kazuur Syndicate quiet for a while. We ought to think about fumigating...
Please exterminate the leading members of the Kazuur Syndicate.
